name: serena-forge
description: Codex port of serena-forge: bundles Serena MCP, Serena-first C# workflows, .cs write enforcement hooks, build checks, and destructive-command protection.

interface.shortDescription: Force Serena-first C# editing and guarded shell operations in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bundles Serena MCP, Serena-first C# navigation/refactor skills, lifecycle hooks that block native .cs patches, end-of-turn dotnet builds, and destructive-command protection for Codex.
defaultPrompt: Refactor this C# symbol through Serena.
Find callers with Serena before editing.
